changeSet.author: hivearmor

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hive_compliance_standard WHERE standard_name = 'NIS2'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hive_compliance_standard (standard_name, standard_description, system_owner) VALUES ( 'NIS2', 'EU Network and Information Security Directive 2 (2022/2555). Cybersecurity requirements for operators of essential and important entities across the EU.', true )

INSERT INTO hive_compliance_standard_section (standard_id, standard_section_name, standard_section_description) SELECT s.id, 'Article 21 - Security Measures', 'Cybersecurity risk-management measures required under Article 21(2) of NIS2 for essential and important entities.' FROM hive_compliance_standard s WHERE s.standard_name = 'NIS2'

changeSet.author: hivearmor

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hive_compliance_control_config c JOIN hive_compliance_standard_section sec ON c.standard_section_id = sec.id JOIN hive_compliance_standard std ON sec.standard_id = std.id WHERE std.standard_name = 'NIS2'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hive_compliance_control_config (standard_section_id, control_name, control_solution, control_remediation, control_strategy) SELECT sec.id, v.name, v.solution, v.remediation, 'ALL' FROM hive_compliance_standard_section sec JOIN hive_compliance_standard std ON sec.standard_id = std.id CROSS JOIN (VALUES ( 'Art.21.2(a) - Risk Analysis and Security Policies', 'Implement and maintain documented information security policies covering risk analysis methodology, asset inventory, and security objectives aligned with NIS2 Article 21.2(a).', 'Conduct a formal risk assessment, document findings in a risk register, and review policies at least annually. Ensure management approval is recorded.' ), ( 'Art.21.2(b) - Incident Handling', 'Establish and operate incident detection, analysis, containment, and recovery capabilities. Maintain audit trail of incidents via the HiveArmor incident management module.', 'Ensure all security alerts are assigned incident IDs within 1 hour of detection. Review open incidents daily. Configure SOAR playbooks for common incident types.' ), ( 'Art.21.2(c) - Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery', 'Implement backup management procedures and disaster recovery plans for information systems. Test recovery procedures at least annually.', 'Verify offsite backups are operational. Document RTO/RPO targets and test recovery procedures. Review backup jobs weekly.' ), ( 'Art.21.2(d) - Supply Chain Security', 'Assess and manage cybersecurity risks arising from relationships with direct suppliers and service providers. Include security requirements in supplier contracts.', 'Maintain an inventory of critical suppliers. Conduct annual security assessments of key vendors. Require suppliers to notify of security incidents within 24 hours.' ), ( 'Art.21.2(e) - Security in Acquisition, Development, and Maintenance', 'Apply security requirements to the acquisition, development, and maintenance of network and information systems, including vulnerability handling and disclosure.', 'Integrate SAST/DAST into the CI/CD pipeline. Track and remediate CVEs with CVSS >= 7.0 within 30 days. Conduct annual penetration testing.' ), ( 'Art.21.2(f) - Cybersecurity Risk Measure Effectiveness', 'Implement policies and procedures to assess the effectiveness of cybersecurity risk management measures, including regular audits and reviews.', 'Run automated compliance scoring daily. Review compliance dashboard weekly. Address controls below 60% score within 14 days.' ), ( 'Art.21.2(g) - Cyber Hygiene and Training', 'Enforce basic cyber hygiene practices and deliver cybersecurity awareness training to all staff. Include phishing simulation and privileged user training.', 'Complete annual security awareness training for all employees. Deliver privileged-access training quarterly. Document completion rates.' ), ( 'Art.21.2(h) - Cryptography and Encryption Policies', 'Implement policies on the use of cryptography and end-to-end encryption to protect data in transit and at rest.', 'Audit TLS configuration across all services. Enforce TLS 1.2+ with strong cipher suites. Encrypt sensitive data at rest using AES-256 or equivalent.' ), ( 'Art.21.2(i) - Human Resources Security and Access Control', 'Apply human resources security controls including background screening, role-based access provisioning, and timely deprovisioning upon departure.', 'Review all privileged accounts monthly. Disable accounts within 24 hours of personnel departure. Enforce least-privilege for all user roles.' ), ( 'Art.21.2(j) - Multi-Factor Authentication', 'Use multi-factor authentication or continuous authentication solutions across all network and information systems, particularly for remote access and privileged accounts.', 'Enable MFA for all user accounts. Enforce MFA for remote access (VPN, RDP). Log and alert on MFA bypass attempts. Review MFA enrollment monthly.' ) ) AS v(name, solution, remediation) WHERE std.standard_name = 'NIS2'

changeSet.author: hivearmor

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hive_compliance_control_mapping m JOIN hive_compliance_control_config c ON m.control_id = c.id JOIN hive_compliance_standard_section sec ON c.standard_section_id = sec.id JOIN hive_compliance_standard std ON sec.standard_id = std.id WHERE std.standard_name = 'NIS2'
